sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click the bottom Y-shape in the bottom container (node 23, rows 43-45, cols 23-25)
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 44, 'col': 24}])
print(f"Action result: {last_action_result}")

# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

before_by_id = {n['id']: n for n in before}
after_by_id = {n['id']: n for n in after}

print("\nChanged objects:")
for nid in sorted(set(list(before_by_id.keys()) + list(after_by_id.keys()))):
    if nid in before_by_id and nid in after_by_id:
        b = before_by_id[nid]
        a = after_by_id[nid]
        if b['boundary'] != a['boundary'] or b['pixels'] != a['pixels']:
            print(f"  Node {nid}: color={a['color']}, pixels {b['pixels']}->{a['pixels']}")
    elif nid in before_by_id and nid not in after_by_id:
        if before_by_id[nid]['pixels'] < 100:
            print(f"  Node {nid} REMOVED: color={before_by_id[nid]['color']}")
    elif nid not in before_by_id and nid in after_by_id:
        if after_by_id[nid]['pixels'] < 100:
            print(f"  Node {nid} ADDED: color={after_by_id[nid]['color']}")

# Check yellow bar area
ascii_grid = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Yellow bar area (rows 26-37, cols 8-12) ===")
for r in range(26, 38):
    print(f"  {r}: {ascii_grid[r][8:12]}")

# Check initial yellow bar for comparison
init_frame = history[0].frame
init_ascii = init_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Initial yellow bar area ===")
for r in range(26, 38):
    print(f"  {r}: {init_ascii[r][8:12]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
